description.ko: 비 내리는 사이버펑크 메트로폴리스를 낭만적으로 바라보며, 첨단 도시의 선명한 반사와 빛의 궤적에 집중합니다.
description.en: A romanticized look at a rainy cyberpunk metropolis, focusing on the vibrant reflections and light trails of the high-tech city.

prompt: A cinematic vertical bird's-eye view of a neon-drenched sky-bridge in NEON-V. Towering #1A0033 skyscrapers are draped in massive 3D holograms pulsing in #FF00FF magenta and #00FFFF cyan. Heavy monsoon rain creates vibrant, distorted reflections on the glass and metallic surfaces. Flying vehicles leave long #FF6B35 orange light trails cutting through thick volumetric fog. Hyper-detailed tech-noir textures, ray-traced reflections, 8k resolution.
